title: In Horologium.
content:
Inter marmoreas Leonorae pendula colles
	Fortunata nimis Machina dicit horas.
	Quas MANIBUS premit illa duas insensa papillas
	Cur mihi sit DIGITO tangere, amata, nefas?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Percy Bysshe Shelley delivers a powerful performance in "In Horologium."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
